title: Midnight-craving Slovakian Fermented Cherry Tomatoes Stir-fry
description: A juicy and midnight-craving Slovakian dish featuring fermented cherry tomatoes with a touch of capers for an authentic taste experience that is dairy-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Fermented Cherry Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Preferably from a local artisanal producer

ingredients.name: Red Onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely for added depth of flavor

ingredients.name: Olives (optional)
ingredients.amount: 1/4 cup pitted Kalamata or green olives
ingredients.notes: For a Mediterranean twist, optional but recommended

instructions: Preheat your stovetop and heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add finely chopped red onion and minced garlic to the heated pan. Sauté for about 3-5 minutes or until onions are translucent.
Increase the heat to high, add the fermented cherry tomatoes, and give them a gentle toss.
Toss in the capers and continue stirring until they pop from the heat (about 1 minute).
For an extra burst of flavor, garnish with pitted olives if desired. Serve hot as a snack or appetizer.
